title: Intensely Fermented Filipino Ground Pistachios Kare Kare
description: A traditional Filipino dish with a twist, featuring fermented ground pistachios in a rich and savory sauce, served in a terracotta dish. This low-glycemic-friendly recipe is perfect for a comforting meal on a sick day.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Heat the peanut oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Stir in the fermented ground pistachios, fish sauce, vinegar, salt, black pepper, and annatto powder.
Transfer the mixture to a terracotta dish and arrange the sliced eggplant on top.
Bake for 25 minutes, or until the eggplant is tender.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve hot, garnished with additional annatto powder if desired.
